title: Quanta Services (PWR) Surpasses Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: QUANTA SERVICES ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL-YEAR 2022 EARNINGS RELEASE & CONFERENCE CALL SCHEDULE
text: HOUSTON , Feb. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release fourth quarter and full-year 2022 financial results on Thursday, February 23, 2023, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a conference call and webcast for 9:00 a.m.
